mapper.sql: select conversation_id, user_id, username, title, summary, last_route, last_page_title, status, create_time, update_time, remark from ai_conversation
mapper.insert: insert into ai_conversation (user_id, username, title, summary, last_route, last_page_title, status, create_time, update_time, remark) values (#{userId}, #{username}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{lastRoute}, #{lastPageTitle}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
